items.title: Japan’s FY26 price revision expands G1 repricing and drives price reduction
items.summary: Japan’s latest NHI drug price revision for FY26 has now come into effect, with an average 4.02% drop in prices on a spending basis across 15,800 products.

items.title: Gilead posts positive Q1 buoyed by HIV drug growth
items.summary: Biktarvy continues to be a strong growth asset for Gilead, while Yeztugo’s launch rides an upward trajectory.

items.title: AI-guided labs are approaching full autonomy
items.summary: Autonomous labs guided by AI can operate with increasing independence and are beginning to outperform human researchers.

items.title: Novo’s CEO champions “record-breaking start” for Wegovy pill in US market
items.summary: Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy pill is already providing financial fuel in the company’s bid to catch Eli Lilly.

items.title: Construction begins on Novartis’ RLT centre in Texas, US
items.summary: Novartis has begun construction on its new 46,000ft² RLT manufacturing facility in Denton, Texas, marking the latest step in its $23bn investment in US manufacturing and research.
